caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned in the center of the frame against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, patterned tunic with a decorative neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom left and bottom center of the scene, a circular yellow logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, her facial expressions shifting from a neutral look to a smile. Her mouth opens and closes as she talks, and her eyes blink and move slightly. The camera remains stationary throughout, maintaining a medium shot that focuses on her upper body and face.
